name: Georgia Peach Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and flour in a saucepan, whisking them together until no lumps remain.
2. Gradually add the milk to the sugar-flour mixture, stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon.
4. Remove from heat and let it cool completely.
5. Once cooled, stir in the crushed peach pulp and lemon juice.
6. Gently fold in the whipped cream until well combined.
7. Pour into freezer-safe containers and freeze for at least 2 hours, or until firm.
Makes 2 quarts.
